description: A vessel agent needs to arrange for five crew members to sign off the ship and five to sign on.

nodes.task_description: Receive the crew change request with the names and details of the signing on/off crew.

expected_outcome.value: Operator has the full list of crew members.

nodes.task_description: Coordinate with immigration and customs authorities to get the necessary clearances and shore passes.

expected_outcome.value: The operator submits the crew list to the authorities for approval.

nodes.task_description: Arrange for transportation to take the signing-off crew from the vessel to the airport and the signing-on crew to the vessel.

expected_outcome.value: Transport is booked with an approved provider.
